name: 下藥/下毒（宮廷陰謀）
description: 開場的皇后下藥和中段Lady Lily的巫蠱下毒，都是後宮劇的經典張力行為。觀眾對「毒」和「藥」天然敏感，這類行為立即拉高緊張感。
tags: 蠱蟲在皮膚下蠕動的恐怖畫面、皇帝昏迷不醒的危急場面

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated Unfavored Concubine,Unexpectedly Use Modern Knowledge Raise Baby,Emperor Shock!
examples.excerpt: Laura, you dare to drug me?... What the emperor is suffering from is a parasite curse. We all witnessed that worm crawling beneath his skin.
examples.context: 蠱蟲在皮膚下蠕動的恐怖畫面、皇帝昏迷不醒的危急場面
